title: April 2022 to-do — MTH 231, HEG issue selection, sell glasses, find iPad, Mt. McLoughlin
html:
TL;DR

  • Seven-line April 2022 to-do mixing MTH 231 coursework (osu discrete math), HEG honors-college issue selection, FB-Marketplace plans (sell glasses, buy iPad), and a "climb Mt. McLoughlin" line.
  • Adds HEG (Honors English Group / Honors Education Group — OSU honors-college coursework) to the entity graph as a 2022-era academic affiliation.
  • FB Marketplace confirmed as Yahir's secondary-market default — selling glasses, sourcing an iPad — same channel speculated about in 2022 01 14 car acessories trash can.
  • "Climb Mt. McLoughlin" is a rare in-vault outdoor-goal datapoint; lines up with the Grants Pass/southern oregon mountains adjacency Yahir grew up in.
  • Sister doc to 2022 04 21 water treatment coursework / 2022 04 21 water treatment wetlands in the osu coursework cluster; same week.

What's actually in the note

-math 231 review for midterm
-HEG ISSUE SELECTION
-quiz 3 HEG
-post glasses on fb marketplace
-start looking for iPad…
-do extra credit for math 231
-climb mt mcloughlin

Why it matters

Three things to mine:

  1. Honors-college fingerprint. The HEG mentions confirm Yahir was in osu honors-college coursework spring 2022 — useful context for the osig pitch later that year.
  2. iPad sourcing. "Start looking for iPad" — ties into Yahir's tooling-acquisition log; the iPad shows up later in 2022–23 study notes. He was buying it secondhand on FB.
  3. Mt. McLoughlin. The Klamath-Falls-area volcanic peak. Single in-vault mention; if he ever does the climb, it'd be a 2022 outdoors goals checkmark.

Open questions

  • Did he climb Mt. McLoughlin? (No follow-up trace in 2022 corpus.)
  • Did he sell the glasses? (Unknown.)
  • What was the HEG issue topic? (Note doesn't say.)

Wikilinks
